variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will anyone other than Carlos Alcaraz and Jannik Sinner win a major in 2026 (men's tennis)?

variables.name: aus_open_2026_winner_status
variables.description: Whether the winner of the 2026 Australian Open is someone other than Carlos Alcaraz or Jannik Sinner. Given the today's date of 2026-02-01, this reflects the immediate outcome of the first major of the year.

variables.name: alcaraz_sinner_combined_majors_played
variables.description: The total number of Grand Slam tournaments in 2026 where both Alcaraz and Sinner successfully reach at least the quarterfinal stage, indicating their health and form throughout the season.

variables.name: non_duo_top_five_titles
variables.description: The number of ATP Masters 1000 titles won in 2026 by players other than Alcaraz and Sinner, serving as a proxy for the competitiveness of the field.

variables.name: djokovic_major_win_2026
variables.description: Whether Novak Djokovic wins at least one Grand Slam title in 2026, representing the most likely individual outside the duo to break their dominance.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the Lumina oral probiotic treatment reduce the rate of cavities by at least 50% in the 4 years after application?

variables.name: published_clinical_trial_results
variables.description: Whether a peer-reviewed or formal clinical study reporting on the efficacy of Lumina (BCS3-L1) in reducing caries has been published by 2030.

variables.name: lumina_colonization_success_rate
variables.description: The percentage of users in whom the Lumina strain (BCS3-L1) successfully colonizes the oral microbiome and remains detectable 12 months after a single application.

variables.name: relative_reduction_in_s_mutans
variables.description: The average factor by which the concentration of wild-type Streptococcus mutans is reduced in the oral biofilm of Lumina users compared to a control group.

variables.name: manifold_market_liquidity
variables.description: The total volume of trade on the linked Manifold market at the time of resolution, serving as a proxy for the amount of information aggregated by the market.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will  an attempt be made to fire Jerome Powell before the end of his term?

variables.name: fed_funds_rate_change
variables.description: The net change in the federal funds target rate (upper bound) between February 1, 2026, and May 1, 2026. Negative values indicate rate cuts.

variables.name: official_white_house_legal_opinion
variables.description: Whether the White House Office of Legal Counsel (OLC) or the Department of Justice issues a formal public or leaked memo explicitly stating the President has the legal authority to remove the Fed Chair 'at will' before May 15, 2026.

variables.name: public_presidential_ultimatum
variables.description: Whether President Trump publicly issues a direct ultimatum on social media or in a press conference specifically demanding Powell's resignation by a certain date or threatening immediate firing if rates are not cut by a specific amount before his term ends.

variables.name: sp500_quarterly_return
variables.description: The percentage return of the S&P 500 index from February 1, 2026, to May 1, 2026. Low or negative returns may increase political pressure on the Fed.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will a new multilateral security agreement involving at least three Middle East and North Africa (MENA) states (excluding Iran, Saudi Arabia, Turkey, and Israel) be publicly announced by 30 June 2026?

variables.name: joint_military_exercises_count
variables.description: The number of joint military exercises involving at least three of the specified MENA countries (excluding the four major powers) held between February 2025 and May 2026.

variables.name: arab_league_security_summit_held
variables.description: Whether a high-level summit or ministerial meeting specifically focused on regional security or defense integration is held by the Arab League before June 30, 2026.

variables.name: red_sea_security_incidents
variables.description: The total number of reported maritime security incidents (attacks, seizures, or skirmishes) in the Red Sea and Gulf of Aden between July 2025 and June 2026, which often spurs multilateral security responses among littoral states.

variables.name: mena_defense_spending_growth
variables.description: The average year-over-year percentage change in defense spending for Egypt, UAE, and Jordan for the 2025 fiscal year, indicating the appetite for new security investments.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the FDA have authorized a medical device that incorporates LLM-based functionality by 31 March 2026?

variables.name: fda_final_guidance_llm
variables.description: Has the FDA issued a final (non-draft) guidance document specifically addressing the regulatory requirements for Large Language Models or Generative AI in medical devices by January 1, 2026?

variables.name: total_ai_ml_authorizations_2025
variables.description: The total number of AI/ML-enabled medical devices authorized by the FDA during the full calendar year of 2025.

variables.name: pccp_submissions_count
variables.description: The estimated number of Predetermined Change Control Plan (PCCP) submissions related to software-as-a-medical-device (SaMD) received by the FDA by February 2026.

variables.name: major_health_tech_llm_filing
variables.description: Has a major health technology company (e.g., Google Health, Microsoft/Nuance, or Epic Systems) publicly announced a 510(k) or De Novo submission for an LLM-based diagnostic or clinical decision support tool by December 31, 2025?

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Russia capture Kostyantynivka by March 31?

variables.name: control_of_chasiv_yar
variables.description: Will Russia have full control of the city of Chasiv Yar (according to ISW or DeepStateMap) by March 1, 2026? Chasiv Yar is the primary high-ground obstacle on the operational axis toward Kostyantynivka.

variables.name: distance_from_frontline_km
variables.description: The shortest distance from the nearest Russian-controlled territory to the Kostyantynivka railroad station as of February 1, 2026.

variables.name: russian_advance_rate_donetsk
variables.description: The average daily rate of territorial advance by Russian forces across the entire Donetsk Oblast sector during the month of February 2026.

variables.name: us_military_aid_status
variables.description: Is there an active, Congressionally-approved US military aid package being delivered to Ukraine as of March 1, 2026? This represents the defensive capacity to hold major urban hubs.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will there be more than ten times as many 'Battles' in Saudi Arabia for the 30 days before 2026-02-08 compared to one plus the 30-day average of 'Battles' over the 360 days preceding 2026-02-01?

e.g. If the forecast due date is 2024-01-01 and we have the following data:
Date,'Battles'
2023-11-11,1
2023-10-10,2
to calculate one plus the 30-day average of 'Battles' over the preceding 360 days, we’d have: 1+(1+2)/12=1.25.

In this example, for the question to resolve positively, 13 (10 x 1.25) or more 'Battles' would need to occur in the 30 days leading up to the resolution.

variables.name: historical_360_day_battle_count
variables.description: Total number of 'Battles' recorded by ACLED in Saudi Arabia between 2025-02-06 and 2026-02-01.

variables.name: yemen_saudi_border_conflict_status
variables.description: Whether a major military offensive or escalation involving cross-border ground incursions (battles) is active between Houthi forces and Saudi forces during the target period.

variables.name: recent_30_day_explosions_count
variables.description: Total number of 'Explosions/Remote violence' events in Saudi Arabia in the 30 days before 2026-02-08, as these often correlate with or precede ground battles.

variables.name: internal_security_clash_frequency
variables.description: Total number of 'Battles' occurring within Saudi Arabia's interior (non-border regions) involving state forces and domestic insurgents or militants during the target period.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Clermont-Ferrand Auvergne Airport will be higher on 2026-02-08 than on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: avg_temp_clermont_feb_01
variables.description: The daily average temperature at Clermont-Ferrand Auvergne Airport on February 1st, 2026.

variables.name: avg_temp_clermont_feb_08
variables.description: The daily average temperature at Clermont-Ferrand Auvergne Airport on February 8th, 2026.

variables.name: clermont_historical_feb_warming_trend
variables.description: The historical difference in average temperature between February 8th and February 1st at Clermont-Ferrand over the past 30 years.

variables.name: presence_of_atlantic_cyclone
variables.description: Whether a major Atlantic low-pressure system (cyclone) is centered over Western Europe on February 8th, 2026, typically bringing warmer maritime air to central France.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Pamandzi will be higher on 2026-02-08 than on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: pamandzi_avg_temp_feb_01
variables.description: The daily average temperature at the Pamandzi weather station on 2026-02-01.

variables.name: historical_temp_trend_february
variables.description: The historical average change in daily mean temperature at Pamandzi between February 1st and February 8th over the last 20 years.

variables.name: regional_cyclone_activity_indicator
variables.description: The presence of an active tropical cyclone or significant low-pressure system in the Mozambique Channel influencing Mayotte's weather on 2026-02-08.

variables.name: oni_index_anomaly
variables.description: The Oceanic Niño Index (ONI) three-month running mean of ERSST.v5 SST anomalies in the Niño 3.4 region for the period covering February 2026, influencing regional temperature patterns.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the Chicago Board Options Exchange's Crude Oil ETF Volatility Index have increased by 2026-02-08 as compared to its value on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: crude_oil_price_change
variables.description: The percentage change in the front-month WTI Crude Oil futures price between Feb 1 and Feb 8, 2026. Rapid price movements typically drive the OVX index higher.

variables.name: geopolitical_risk_escalation
variables.description: Whether a significant new geopolitical event or escalation (e.g., conflict in a major oil-producing region, new major sanctions) occurs between Feb 1 and Feb 8, 2026.

variables.name: baseline_ovx_level
variables.description: The value of the CBOE Crude Oil ETF Volatility Index (OVX) on February 1, 2026. Higher starting values often mean a higher probability of mean reversion (decreasing).

variables.name: global_equity_volatility_trend
variables.description: The change in the CBOE Volatility Index (VIX) between Feb 1 and Feb 8, 2026. Volatility often correlates across asset classes during periods of market stress.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the price of Brent crude oil have increased by 2026-02-08 as compared to its value on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: weekly_brent_price_change
variables.description: The absolute change in the price of Brent crude oil between 2026-02-01 and 2026-02-08.

variables.name: opec_plus_production_shift
variables.description: The net change in planned daily production quotas or output targets announced by OPEC+ members in the week leading up to 2026-02-08.

variables.name: major_supply_disruption_event
variables.description: Occurrence of a significant geopolitical or weather event between 2026-02-01 and 2026-02-08 that impacts global oil supply by more than 500,000 barrels per day.

variables.name: us_dollar_index_change
variables.description: The percentage change in the ICE U.S. Dollar Index (DXY) from 2026-02-01 to 2026-02-08, which typically has an inverse relationship with oil prices.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will CRL's market close price on 2026-02-08 be higher than its market close price on 2026-02-01?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: weekly_sp500_return
variables.description: The percentage change in the S&P 500 Index from the market close on February 1, 2026, to the market close on February 8, 2026, reflecting overall market sentiment.

variables.name: crl_earnings_surprise
variables.description: The difference between Charles River's reported EPS and the consensus analyst estimate for the quarter ending closest to February 2026, if reported within this window.

variables.name: biotech_sector_performance
variables.description: The price performance of the iShares Biotechnology ETF (IBB) between the close on February 1, 2026, and February 8, 2026, indicating sector-specific momentum.

variables.name: major_regulatory_approval_news
variables.description: Whether Charles River or a top-tier strategic partner announces a major FDA approval or significant clinical milestone between Feb 1 and Feb 8, 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: According to Wikipedia, will R Praggnanandhaa have an Elo rating on 2026-02-08 that's at least 1% higher than on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: praggnanandhaa_elo_feb_2026
variables.description: R Praggnanandhaa's official FIDE Elo rating as published on the February 2026 list.

variables.name: rating_change_january_matches
variables.description: The net Elo change from games played by Praggnanandhaa during January 2026 (primarily the Tata Steel Chess Tournament), which would be reflected in the Feb 1st rating.

variables.name: wikipedia_fide_update_latency
variables.description: The number of days after the 1st of the month it typically takes for the Wikipedia 'FIDE rankings' page to be updated with the new month's official FIDE data.

variables.name: participation_in_tata_steel_2026
variables.description: Whether R Praggnanandhaa participates in the 2026 Tata Steel Chess Tournament (Masters category), which is the primary source of rating volatility in January.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will XOM's market close price on 2026-02-08 be higher than its market close price on 2026-02-01?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: brent_crude_price_change
variables.description: The percentage change in the price of Brent Crude oil between February 1, 2026, and February 8, 2026.

variables.name: xom_q4_earnings_surprise
variables.description: The difference between Exxon Mobil's reported earnings per share (EPS) and the consensus analyst estimate for the quarter ending December 2025 (typically reported in early February).

variables.name: energy_sector_etf_performance
variables.description: The weekly percentage return of the Energy Select Sector SPDR Fund (XLE) from February 1, 2026, to February 8, 2026, reflecting broader sector trends.

variables.name: fed_interest_rate_hike
variables.description: Whether the Federal Reserve announces an interest rate hike during a meeting occurring between January 15 and February 8, 2026, which could impact capital-intensive industries like energy.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Elon Musk be worth more than $1 Trillion by Jan 1st, 2029?

variables.name: tesla_stock_price_2028
variables.description: The closing price of Tesla (TSLA) stock on the last trading day of 2028, adjusted for any splits occurring after February 2026. Tesla is typically the largest component of Musk's wealth.

variables.name: spacex_valuation_2028
variables.description: The estimated private market valuation of SpaceX based on the most recent funding round or secondary sale reported by major financial news outlets by late 2028.

variables.name: musk_pay_package_status
variables.description: Whether Elon Musk's massive Tesla compensation package (originally valued at ~$56B) is legally upheld and fully exercisable as of January 1st, 2029, following all appeals and litigation.

variables.name: x_ai_valuation_growth
variables.description: The estimated valuation of Musk's AI company, xAI, by the end of 2028, reflecting the growth of his private AI assets.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Barack Obama be arrested before July 2026?

variables.name: federal_indictment_issued
variables.description: Whether a federal grand jury or a Department of Justice special counsel issues a formal indictment against Barack Obama before July 2026.

variables.name: doj_special_counsel_appointment
variables.description: Whether a Special Counsel has been officially appointed by the Attorney General to investigate Barack Obama's actions during the 2016-2020 period.

variables.name: approval_rating_of_trump
variables.description: The average job approval rating of Donald Trump according to FiveThirtyEight or a similar aggregator as of May 1, 2026. Higher ratings may provide more political capital for high-profile legal actions.

variables.name: congressional_contempt_referrals
variables.description: The number of formal contempt of Congress or criminal referrals issued by House or Senate committees targeting Barack Obama or his immediate inner circle between July 2025 and June 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Wagner Moura win the Academy Award for Best Actor at the 2026 Academy Awards?

variables.name: moura_win_sag_award
variables.description: Whether Wagner Moura wins the Screen Actors Guild (SAG) Award for Outstanding Performance by a Male Actor in a Leading Role in 2026. SAG winners are highly predictive of Oscar outcomes as actors make up the largest branch of the Academy.

variables.name: moura_win_bafta
variables.description: Whether Wagner Moura wins the BAFTA Award for Best Actor in a Leading Role in 2026. This indicates momentum from the British Academy, which shares significant membership overlap with the Academy.

variables.name: chalamet_oscar_implied_probability
variables.description: The average implied probability (from betting markets or major forecasting sites like GoldDerby) for Timothée Chalamet winning the Oscar for Marty Supreme on March 1, 2026. Chalamet is a direct competitor.

variables.name: secret_agent_best_picture_nomination
variables.description: Whether the film 'The Secret Agent' was also nominated for Best Picture at the 98th Academy Awards. Lead acting winners usually come from Best Picture-nominated films.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the United Nations Security Council adopt a resolution related to the conflict in Sudan by 1 May 2026?

variables.name: unsc_sudan_draft_count
variables.description: The number of draft resolutions formally circulated or tabled at the UN Security Council specifically addressing the Sudan conflict between 2026-02-15 and 2026-05-01.

variables.name: russia_china_veto_usage
variables.description: Whether either Russia or China exercises a veto on a proposed resolution related to the Sudan conflict during the period from February 15, 2026, to May 1, 2026.

variables.name: un_humanitarian_alert_level
variables.description: The number of formal 'high-level' or 'emergency' briefings provided by the UN Office for the Coordination of Humanitarian Affairs (OCHA) to the Security Council regarding Sudan between 2026-02-15 and 2026-05-01.

variables.name: major_city_control_shift
variables.description: Whether a major Sudanese state capital (such as Port Sudan, Kassala, or Wad Madani) changes control between the SAF and RSF or undergoes a new total siege during the forecast window.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Jama'at Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin (JNIM) take control of Bamako, Mali by 1 June 2026?

variables.name: jnim_control_regional_capitals
variables.description: Number of Malian regional capitals (excluding Bamako) under full physical control of JNIM as of May 15, 2026. This measures the group's ability to transition from insurgency to territorial administration.

variables.name: bamako_fuel_price_index
variables.description: The ratio of the average black market or official price of gasoline in Bamako in May 2026 compared to the average price in May 2025. A high ratio indicates the success of the blockade in strangling the city's logistics.

variables.name: russian_africa_corps_withdrawal
variables.description: Whether a significant portion (more than 50%) of Russian Africa Corps personnel or Wagner Group successors are reported by credible news sources to have withdrawn from Bamako or ceased security operations in the capital before June 1, 2026.

variables.name: jnim_manpower_estimate
variables.description: Total estimated number of active JNIM combatants across the Sahel region as reported by ACLED or similar security monitors in early 2026. A significant increase suggests the capability to siege and enter a large city.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Alibaba have the best AI model at the end of February 2026?

variables.name: qwen_arena_score_gap
variables.description: The difference between the highest-ranked Alibaba (Qwen) model and the top-ranked model on the Chatbot Arena Leaderboard as of mid-February 2026.

variables.name: alibaba_top_three_presence
variables.description: Does Alibaba have at least one model in the top 3 of the Chatbot Arena Leaderboard by February 15, 2026?

variables.name: us_export_control_severity
variables.description: The number of major high-end GPU architectural generations (e.g., Blackwell, Rubin) restricted for export to China by February 2026.

variables.name: qwen_major_release_count
variables.description: The number of major version updates (e.g., moving from Qwen 2 to Qwen 3) released by Alibaba between January 2024 and February 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Israel win Eurovision 2026?

variables.name: israel_participation_confirmed
variables.description: Whether Israel is officially included in the final list of participating countries for Eurovision 2026 released by the EBU.

variables.name: betting_odds_rank
variables.description: Israel's average rank in the aggregate betting odds for Eurovision 2026 one week before the final (lower is better, e.g., 1st place is 1).

variables.name: public_vote_score_normalized
variables.description: The total number of points Israel receives from the televote in the Grand Final, divided by 100.

variables.name: ebu_rule_disqualification
variables.description: Whether the EBU disqualifies Israel's entry due to political content in lyrics or staging before the semi-finals occur.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will there be more than ten times as many 'Protests' in Azerbaijan for the 30 days before 2026-02-22 compared to one plus the 30-day average of 'Protests' over the 360 days preceding 2026-02-15?

e.g. If the forecast due date is 2024-01-01 and we have the following data:
Date,'Protests'
2023-11-11,1
2023-10-10,2
to calculate one plus the 30-day average of 'Protests' over the preceding 360 days, we’d have: 1+(1+2)/12=1.25.

In this example, for the question to resolve positively, 13 (10 x 1.25) or more 'Protests' would need to occur in the 30 days leading up to the resolution.

variables.name: historical_360_day_protest_count
variables.description: Total number of 'Protests' in Azerbaijan recorded by ACLED in the 360 days preceding 2026-02-15. This determines the baseline for the threshold.

variables.name: major_election_unrest_index
variables.description: Binary indicator of whether a national election (presidential or parliamentary) is scheduled or held in Azerbaijan between 2026-01-01 and 2026-02-22, which historically spikes protest activity.

variables.name: nagorno_karabakh_escalation_level
variables.description: A measure of reported military or diplomatic escalations regarding the Nagorno-Karabakh region or border disputes with Armenia in early 2026, which can catalyze nationalist or anti-government protests.

variables.name: economic_misery_index_change
variables.description: The year-over-year percentage change in the combined inflation and unemployment rate in Azerbaijan as of early 2026, serving as a proxy for socio-economic drivers of mass demonstration.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Brest Bretagne Airport will be higher on 2026-02-22 than on 2026-02-15?

variables.name: feb_15_avg_temp
variables.description: The actual daily average temperature recorded at Brest Bretagne Airport (07110) on February 15, 2026.

variables.name: feb_22_forecast_anomaly
variables.description: The forecasted temperature anomaly for Brest, France on February 22, 2026, relative to the 1991-2020 climatological mean for that date.

variables.name: north_atlantic_oscillation_index
variables.description: The daily North Atlantic Oscillation (NAO) index value on February 22, 2026; positive values often correlate with warmer, wetter weather in Western Europe.

variables.name: presence_of_westerly_flow
variables.description: Whether the predominant synoptic-scale wind direction at 850 hPa over Brittany on February 22, 2026, is from the west or southwest (225° to 315°), which typically brings milder maritime air.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the euro short-term rate (volume-weighted trimmed mean), a measure of the borrowing costs of banks in the euro area, have increased by 2026-02-22 as compared to its value on 2026-02-15?

variables.name: ecb_deposit_facility_rate
variables.description: The European Central Bank's deposit facility rate as of February 22, 2026. Changes in this policy rate typically cause a direct shift in the €STR.

variables.name: ecb_rate_change_announcement
variables.description: Whether the ECB Governing Council announces an increase in the key interest rates (including the deposit facility rate) between February 15 and February 22, 2026.

variables.name: estr_volume_change
variables.description: The percentage change in the total volume of transactions underlying the €STR between the February 15 reporting date and the February 22 reporting date. Significant volume shifts can impact the trimmed mean calculation.

variables.name: excess_liquidity_eurozone
variables.description: The total amount of excess liquidity (deposits in the deposit facility plus current account holdings minus reserve requirements) in the Eurosystem on February 22, 2026. Higher liquidity typically keeps €STR closer to the deposit rate floor.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: According to Wikipedia, will Evgeniia Chikunova still hold the world record for 200m breaststroke in long course (50 metres) swimming pools on 2026-02-22?

variables.name: world_aquatics_championships_2025_record_broken
variables.description: Whether the women's 200m breaststroke long course world record is broken during the 2025 World Aquatics Championships (scheduled for mid-2025).

variables.name: number_of_swimmers_sub_2_18_50_before_2026
variables.description: The count of unique swimmers who record a time faster than 2:18.50 in the women's 200m breaststroke (long course) between 2024-01-01 and 2026-02-15. Chikunova's current record is 2:17.55.

variables.name: chikunova_active_status_2026
variables.description: Whether Evgeniia Chikunova has competed in at least one sanctioned long course swimming event between January 2025 and Feb 2026, indicating her continued dominance/defense of her record.

variables.name: days_record_remains_unbeaten_post_2024
variables.description: Number of days between January 1, 2025, and February 22, 2026, that the existing record of 2:17.55 remains the fastest time ever recorded and ratified in a long course 50m pool.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: According to Wikipedia, will a vaccine have been developed for Heartland virus disease by 2026-02-22?

variables.name: clinical_trials_count
variables.description: The number of active or completed clinical trials for a Heartland virus vaccine registered on ClinicalTrials.gov as of early 2026.

variables.name: fda_approval_status
variables.description: Whether the FDA has granted any form of approval (Emergency Use Authorization or full Biologics License Application) for a Heartland virus vaccine by February 2026.

variables.name: wikipedia_vaccine_mention
variables.description: Whether the 'Heartland virus' or 'List of infectious diseases' Wikipedia pages mention a specific vaccine name in a non-experimental context.

variables.name: annual_reported_cases
variables.description: The average number of human cases of Heartland virus disease reported to the CDC annually between 2022 and 2025 (reflecting market demand/urgency).

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Jama'at Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin (JNIM) take control of Bamako, Mali by 1 June 2026?

variables.name: government_control_kati_base
variables.description: Whether the Malian government and military maintain effective control over the Kati military base (the historical seat of Malian military power near Bamako) on 1 May 2026.

variables.name: jnim_active_combatant_count
variables.description: The estimated number of active JNIM combatants operating within the Sahel region as of April 2026, according to security analyst reports.

variables.name: fuel_price_inflation_bamako
variables.description: The percentage increase in the average black market or official price of a liter of gasoline in Bamako on 1 April 2026 compared to the price on 1 September 2025, reflecting the severity of the blockade.

variables.name: africa_corps_presence
variables.description: Whether the Russian Africa Corps (formerly Wagner Group) maintains a continued military presence of at least 500 personnel in or around Bamako to support the Malian junta as of 15 May 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will LVS's market close price on 2026-02-22 be higher than its market close price on 2026-02-15?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: macao_gaming_revenue_growth
variables.description: The year-over-year percentage change in Macao total gross gaming revenue (GGR) for the month of January 2026, which heavily influences sentiment for LVS leading into the forecast period.

variables.name: sp500_weekly_return
variables.description: The percentage return of the S&P 500 index between the market close on February 15, 2026, and February 22, 2026, representing the broader market beta.

variables.name: lvs_relative_strength_index
variables.description: The 14-day Relative Strength Index (RSI) of LVS as of the market close on February 15, 2026, indicating whether the stock is in an overbought or oversold condition.

variables.name: china_economic_policy_shift
variables.description: Whether the Chinese government announces or implements a major restrictive regulatory change or significant economic stimulus package specifically targeting the Macao gaming or travel sector between February 1, 2026, and February 22, 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will BLK's market close price on 2026-03-08 be higher than its market close price on 2026-03-01?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: sp500_price_change_pct
variables.description: The percentage change in the S&P 500 index between the market close on March 1, 2026, and March 8, 2026. This measures general market sentiment which highly correlates with asset manager stocks.

variables.name: blk_implied_volatility
variables.description: The average 30-day implied volatility for BlackRock (BLK) options as of March 1, 2026. Higher volatility indicates a higher probability of significant price swings in either direction.

variables.name: fed_funds_rate_change_expectation
variables.description: The expected basis point change in the Federal Funds Rate target for the next FOMC meeting as implied by 30-Day Fed Funds Futures on March 1, 2026. Interest rate expectations significantly impact valuation of financial firms.

variables.name: major_market_correction_event
variables.description: Whether a major global market correction (defined as a single-day drop of >3% in the S&P 500) occurs during the week of March 1, 2026, to March 8, 2026.
